---
format:
    html:
        css: ../style.css
        include-in-header: home_button.html
filters:
  - pyodide
execute:
  echo: true
  code-tools: true
  freeze: auto
---

::: section
## Practical Statistics for Research Projects

<a class="colab-button" href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/ampivirotto/virtual_workshops/blob/main/pratical_stats/Practical_Statistics.ipynb" target="_blank"> Launch Full Notebook in Colab </a>

<iframe src="slideshow.html" width="800" height="500" style="border:none;"></iframe>

:::
